response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Checked phonetics of song lyrics and dialogue against audio. Perfect match with Amala's 'Daidai Dai Dai Daikirai' reference lyrics.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference lyrics for the song portion. Dialogue scenes were manually transcribed and translated with precision.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly timed to vocals. Grouped phrases logically with smooth semantic transitions. Added aggressive truncation to keep up with rapid song transitions.

subtitles.original: ただ、イナと歌うのは楽しいけど、
subtitles.english: But then, singing with Ina is fun,

subtitles.original: キアラと歌ってもなぁ...
subtitles.english: ...but with you...

subtitles.original: それどういう意味？
subtitles.english: What's that supposed to mean?

subtitles.original: 私の歌じゃダメってこと？
subtitles.english: You don't think my singing is good enough?

subtitles.original: やってやろうじゃないの！ほら、さっさと歌うよ！
subtitles.english: Let's do this! Come on, let's sing right now!

subtitles.original: 全部全部アンタのせいだ
subtitles.english: All, all, it's all your fault.

subtitles.original: 反吐が出るくらいにウザったいわ
subtitles.english: It makes me want to throw up, it's so annoying.

subtitles.original: 何かに縋って諂って
subtitles.english: Clinging to something, flattering someone,

subtitles.original: 期待したアタシが馬鹿だった
subtitles.english: I was a fool to have expectations.

subtitles.original: ご機嫌伺いの八方美人
subtitles.english: An eight-way beauty that serves to please,

subtitles.original: それ故にアンチな一生gimme
subtitles.english: That's why you'll get a lifelong anti, gimme.

subtitles.original: 浅いキャパシティ まいどおおきに
subtitles.english: Shallow capacity, thanks as always,

subtitles.original: つまる とこ 人生 ずっと 地味
subtitles.english: In the end, your life is always plain.

subtitles.original: ｢憎たらしい！｣ ｢痛々しい！｣
subtitles.english: 'Hatable!' 'Painful!'

subtitles.original: 無視出来ないのが一層
subtitles.english: Not being able to ignore it makes it even more

subtitles.original: 腹立たしい 苛立たしい
subtitles.english: Frustrating, irritating,

subtitles.original: そろそろ飽きた 自画自賛に
subtitles.english: I'm sick of your self-praise.

subtitles.original: ライクの反対はアパシー
subtitles.english: The opposite of like is apathy

subtitles.original: ≒繋がれた証
subtitles.english: ≒ proof of being connected.

subtitles.original: 切り離せない関係
subtitles.english: An inseparable relationship,

subtitles.original: 逸らしてしまいたいわ
subtitles.english: I want to break free.

subtitles.original: これは所謂ヘイトスピーチ
subtitles.english: This is what you call hate speech,

subtitles.original: 匿名性の声明を生命に載せてんだ
subtitles.english: I'm putting anonymous statements into life.

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まないサイレン 近づく度に痙攣
subtitles.english: Unending siren, cramping every time it approaches,

subtitles.original: 赤信号にずっと従順です
subtitles.english: I'm always obedient to the red light.

subtitles.original: 大体アナタのコト アタシ
subtitles.english: Basically, how I see you,

subtitles.original: ダイダイダイダイダイキライ
subtitles.english: I hate you, hate you, hate you, hate you, hate you!

subtitles.original: omg情けない最早
subtitles.english: OMG, how pathetic, already,

subtitles.original: バイバイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: Bye-bye, bye-bye, I want to say bye.

subtitles.original: 脳内も予測不能故に
subtitles.english: My brain is also unpredictable, so

subtitles.original: 解解解解解は無い
subtitles.english: There's no, no, no, no, no solution.

subtitles.original: どうだい？ アタシのコト アナタ
subtitles.english: How about it? How do you see me?

subtitles.original: ダイダイダイダイダイキライになった？
subtitles.english: Have you come to hate me, hate me, hate me, hate me, hate me?

subtitles.original: あァ 百害あって一利ナシ nothing not see
subtitles.english: Ah, a hundred harms and no benefit, nothing not see,

subtitles.original: もしタラレバ並べても ニコチンだし
subtitles.english: Even if you line up the ifs, it's just nicotine.

subtitles.original: i miss youって近付いた結末は凡ミス 凡ミス
subtitles.english: The result of approaching with 'I miss you' is a clumsy mistake, a clumsy mistake,

subtitles.original: センキュー 反面教師
subtitles.english: Thank you, counter-teacher,

subtitles.original: 後味一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: This aftertaste will never disappear in my lifetime.

subtitles.original: よしよし いい子ね
subtitles.english: Good, good, good boy,

subtitles.original: 笑顔振り撒きパラパラ いい子ね
subtitles.english: Smiling, scattering smiles, what a good boy.

subtitles.original: だけど だけど その本性は？
subtitles.english: But, but, what's your true nature?

subtitles.original: 善悪の区別も付かないの？
subtitles.english: Can't you even distinguish good from evil?

subtitles.original: 減点方式で取り巻く環境に巻かれて
subtitles.english: Wrapped up in an environment that surrounds you with a point-deduction system,

subtitles.original: 生涯、痛い！痛い！痛い！も聞かれないわ！って
subtitles.english: In your lifetime, no one will even hear you cry 'Painful! Painful! Painful!'

subtitles.original: 当然の報いにクラっちゃった
subtitles.english: I got hit by the natural retribution,

subtitles.original: 人は鏡なんです
subtitles.english: People are mirrors,

subtitles.original: 実のところ依存は両辺です
subtitles.english: In reality, dependency is two-sided,

subtitles.original: シャットダウンしても付き纏う
subtitles.english: Even if you shut down, it clings to you,

subtitles.original: 己の弱さが不甲斐ない
subtitles.english: My own weakness is shameful.

subtitles.original: 全部全部アンタのせいって
subtitles.english: All, all, it's all your fault,

subtitles.original: 反吐が出るくらいに止まんないわ
subtitles.english: It doesn't stop to the point of throwing up.

subtitles.original: いっその事 切り離せた方が楽なのに な
subtitles.english: If only I could just cut it off, it would be easier.

subtitles.original: 大体アナタのコト アタシ
subtitles.english: Basically, how I see you,

subtitles.original: ダイダイダイダイダイキライ
subtitles.english: I hate you, hate you, hate you, hate you, hate you!

subtitles.original: omg情けない最早
subtitles.english: OMG, how pathetic, already,

subtitles.original: バイバイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: Bye-bye, bye-bye, I want to say bye.

subtitles.english: My brain is also unpredictable, so

subtitles.original: 解解解解解は無い
subtitles.english: There's no, no, no, no, no solution.

subtitles.original: どうだい？ アタシのコト アナタ
subtitles.english: How about it? How do you see me?

subtitles.original: ダイダイダイダイダイキライになった？
subtitles.english: Have you come to hate me, hate me, hate me, hate me, hate me?

subtitles.original: あァ 百害あって一利ナシ nothing not see
subtitles.english: Ah, a hundred harms and no benefit, nothing not see,

subtitles.original: もしタラレバ並べても ニコチンだし
subtitles.english: Even if you line up the ifs, it's just nicotine.

subtitles.english: The result of approaching with 'I miss you' is a clumsy mistake, a clumsy mistake,

subtitles.original: センキュー 反面教師
subtitles.english: Thank you, counter-teacher,

subtitles.original: 後味一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: This aftertaste will never disappear in my lifetime.

subtitles.original: えっ、もう誰なの？
subtitles.english: Ugh, who is it now?

subtitles.original: はーい
subtitles.english: Come in.

subtitles.original: アーニャ、ヤッホー。
subtitles.english: Hey Anya, hello!

subtitles.original: って、大丈夫そう？
subtitles.english: Wait, are you doing okay?

subtitles.original: なんか顔色悪いね。
subtitles.english: You look kind of... not great.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、じゃないかもね。
subtitles.english: I'm okay... actually, maybe not.

subtitles.original: ちょっと横になった方がいいんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Shouldn't you lie down for a bit?

subtitles.original: 周りをぐるぐる走ってあげるから、わための数を数えるといいよ。
subtitles.english: Lie down, and I'll run in circles so you can count me~

subtitles.original: 心配かけてごめん。
subtitles.english: Sorry for making you worry.

subtitles.original: でも、今寝たらダメなんだ。
subtitles.english: But I can't sleep right now.

subtitles.original: なぜなら、あともうちょっとでこの事件を解決できそうなんだから！
subtitles.english: Because I'm so close to solving this case!

subtitles.original: そう？
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: そう、かも。
subtitles.english: Maybe...

subtitles.original: そうじゃないかも。
subtitles.english: Maybe not.

subtitles.original: わかんないけど、とりあえずヒントは揃ったんだ。
subtitles.english: I don't know, but I have all the hints...

subtitles.original: ほな、難しいか。
subtitles.english: Then that's going to be tough.

subtitles.original: わため先輩、程々にしておきましょう。
subtitles.english: Watame-senpai, let's leave her be.

subtitles.original: わためは悪くないよねぇ？
subtitles.english: Watame did nothing wrong, right?

subtitles.original: これが事件を解く鍵なんだ。
subtitles.english: This is the key to solving the case.

subtitles.original: 探偵の直感がそう言ってる。
subtitles.english: My detective intuition is telling me so.

subtitles.original: でも、DNA鑑定では何もわからなかった。
subtitles.english: But the DNA test didn't show anything.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、これは何なんだ？
subtitles.english: Then, what is this?

subtitles.original: これは何なんだ？！
subtitles.english: What is this?!

subtitles.original: その布でそんなにお困りなら...
subtitles.english: If you're so troubled by that cloth...

subtitles.original: じゃ、わためが食べてあげる！
subtitles.english: Then, Watame will eat it for you!

subtitles.original: ねえ、アーニャ、それちょっと見せてくれる？
subtitles.english: Hey Anya, can you let me see that for a second?

subtitles.original: この布についてわかったことはあるけど...
subtitles.english: I found out something about this cloth, but...

subtitles.original: うーん、それを教えたら、ちょっと休憩しない？
subtitles.english: Hmm, if I tell you, will you take a little break?

subtitles.original: 一旦、仕事の手は止めて...
subtitles.english: Stop working for a bit...

subtitles.original: 私たちと遊ぼうよ！
subtitles.english: and hang out with us!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、一緒に歌でも歌う？
subtitles.english: Then, do you want to sing together?

subtitles.original: この街では、情報は歌で買うものみたいだし。
subtitles.english: In this town, it seems information is bought with song.

subtitles.original: おー、楽しそう！
subtitles.english: Oh, that sounds fun!

subtitles.original: オッケー！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: その布には、魔力の痕跡を感じるんだ。
subtitles.english: I can feel a trace of magic on that cloth.
